# Minimal Design

## Overview

Smallest possible DESIGN.md that satisfies @google/design.md@0.1.1 lint. Used by tests/phase0/test_v1_bridge.py.

## Colors

- primary: "#3B82F6"
- background: "#FFFFFF"
- foreground: "#0F172A"

## Typography

- font_family: "system-ui, sans-serif"
- base_size: "16px"

## Components

- card: "Container with padded interior"
- button-primary: "Solid primary call-to-action"
